This line is used to process and spray avocados, extending their shelf life and keeping them as fresh as possible. Another auction features a drying and… Impact tactique : Proposer aux enseignes l'intégration de technologies de conservation pour allonger la durée de vie des produits en rayon et réduire leur taux de démarque.

articles.title: "We are expecting a good crop of mangos for the 2026 season" -- 18/03/2026 10:42
articles.content_fr:
ALERTES SUPPLY
"We are expecting a good crop of mangos for the 2026 season" -- 18/03/2026 10:42
The main mango pest, the fruit fly - which can cause up to 50-80% production losses - is very present in West Africa, particularly in the Ivory Coast, Mali, Burkina Faso, and Senegal. This pest, which causes phytosanitary risks, led to the temporary suspension of Malian mango imports by the European… Impact tactique : Se positionner comme le partenaire de substitution stratégique suite aux suspensions d'importations de mangues maliennes pour pallier les ruptures de stock.

Hapag-Lloyd US$4.2 billion ZIM deal faces Israeli regulatory review -- 18/03/2026 10:42
The planned acquisition of ZIM Integrated Shipping Services by Hapag-Lloyd is progressing, subject to regulatory review, according to Calcalist. The German carrier agreed to acquire all publicly traded shares of ZIM at US$35 per share, valuing the transaction at US$4.2 billion. articles.title: Avocado and mango intake may improve vascular function in prediabetes -- 18/03/2026 10:42
articles.content_fr:
MOUVEMENTS ENSEIGNES
Avocado and mango intake may improve vascular function in prediabetes -- 18/03/2026 10:42
New research indicates that adding avocado and mango to the daily diet may influence cardiovascular health markers in adults with prediabetes. In the study, participants were divided into two groups. The Avocado-Mango group added one medium Hass avocado and one cup of fresh mango to their daily intake… Impact tactique : Négocier des opérations de cross-merchandising mangue/avocat en s'appuyant sur l'argument santé 'bien-être vasculaire' pour augmenter le panier moyen.

"We deliberately waited for prices to fall before sending mangoes to Europe" -- 18/03/2026 10:42

Our goal is to have the first shipment in Europe before the end of the month," says Rodolfo Meza, from the export group having a… Tactical impact: Anticipate the arrival of low-priced Mexican mangoes to secure our end-of-season programs before the European market becomes saturated.
